title: Backup in 4 steps
subtitle: From zero to automated, encrypted, verified Kubernetes backups — without rewriting your operational runbooks.

steps.title: Install the Operator
steps.description: Deploy KubeStash via Helm into any Kubernetes cluster — EKS, GKE, AKS, or on-prem. One command, three minutes.

steps.title: Define BackupConfiguration
steps.description: A single Kubernetes-native CRD declares what to back up, the schedule, retention policy, and which storage backend to use.

steps.title: Monitor Sessions
steps.description: BackupSession objects give you real-time status, per-component snapshots, and structured events — query with kubectl or your existing observability stack.

steps.title: Restore Anytime
steps.description: Create a RestoreSession for full, granular, or point-in-time recovery. Works across namespaces and clusters.
